sourcesContent:
Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your resume workflow.

The pricing screen now combines plan comparison and a checkout-style summary so upgrades feel connected to the actual product journey.

{{ plan.name }}

{{ plan.badge }}

{{ plan.price }}

{{ plan.description }}

  • • {{ feature }}

Checkout

Upgrade summary

Plan {{ selectedPlan.name }}
Billing Monthly
Price {{ selectedPlan.price }}
Total {{ selectedPlan.price }}
Secure checkout UI placeholder
Plan summary is wired to the selected pricing card.
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; interface PricingPlan { name: string; price: string; description: string; features: string[]; badge: string; } @Component({ selector: 'app-pricing', templateUrl: './pricing.component.html' }) export class PricingComponent { readonly plans: PricingPlan[] = [ { name: 'Free', price: 'Rs0', description: 'One resume analysis for first-time users.', features: ['1 resume upload', 'ATS score', 'Basic suggestions'], badge: '' }, { name: 'Pro', price: 'Rs99', description: 'Detailed resume improvement suggestions and premium builder access.', features: ['Detailed summary rewrite', 'Improved bullet points', 'Keyword guidance'], badge: 'Most Popular' }, { name: 'Premium', price: 'Rs199', description: 'Resume analysis plus role matching.', features: ['Everything in Pro', 'Job matches', 'Missing skills tracking'], badge: '' } ]; selectedPlan = this.plans[1]; }
